# TSD Modernization Solutions

> Charlotte-metro web and AI studio for established, reputation-rich local businesses whose website lags their reputation and whose owner has become the bottleneck. We build custom websites and AI so the work doesn't wait on you — you earned the reputation; your tech should carry it. A permanent studio (not a summer project, no end date). Brand of TSD Ventures, LLC.

## Who we serve

Established local businesses whose digital presence has fallen behind their reputation. We pick by situation rather than industry: salons & spas, specialty automotive, wholesale & supply, studios & makers, professional services, specialty retail. If the business runs on the owner's hours, that's what we fix.

## What we build

- **Custom website** — Fast, mobile-first, built to convert, with on-page SEO and analytics wired in. Managed by us, or owned by you.
- **TSD Front Desk** (AI receptionist) — Answers your phone and chat day or night, qualifies the lead, and books the job, then texts you a one-paragraph summary. Built on your real intake flow. Recurring.
- **TSD Concierge** (site assistant) — Answers visitor questions from your own content and catalog: search across docs, videos, and products, with semantic and image-based catalog lookup (RAG).
- **TSD Booking Bridge** (booking & automation) — One booking front door plus the calendar and lead-routing automation behind it, built on the tools you already pay for.

Start with what hurts most and add the rest when you're ready. The website is the storefront; the AI is what runs once you've gone home.

## Pricing

- No fixed public tiers. Every build is a fixed price, quoted in a written proposal within 48 hours of a free fit call.
- [Pricing & estimate](https://tsd-modernization.com/pricing): Custom, fixed-price builds — get a real range from the /pricing estimator. Tell the estimator your size and what you want running for a realistic range in two clicks; the exact, fixed number depends on your content, your catalog, and the systems you already run.
- **Managed plans — website from $49/mo, AI from $73/mo**: Optional monthly upkeep. A managed website gets hosting plus content edits on request; Managed AI gets re-indexing of new content, prompt and model upkeep, monitoring, and a monthly report. Starts after launch, cancel anytime.
- Every build runs the client's way — Managed (we host it, maintain it, and make changes on request) or Owned (source code, credentials, and a runbook are yours at handoff). 100% money-back guarantee. 48-hour written proposal.

## Service pages

- [Websites](https://tsd-modernization.com/services/websites): Fast, mobile-first custom websites with on-page SEO, analytics and Search Console wiring, and full handoff docs. Custom, fixed-price builds — get a real range from the /pricing estimator, 2-4 weeks, managed by us or owned by you outright.
- [AI integration](https://tsd-modernization.com/services/ai-integration): TSD Front Desk, TSD Concierge, and TSD Booking Bridge — AI built on your real intake, content, and catalog. Managed AI optional.
- [Process modernization](https://tsd-modernization.com/services/process-modernization): Take the repetitive work off the owner's plate — consolidated booking, lead routing, and automation on the tools you already pay for.

## Segment landing pages

- [Salons & spas](https://tsd-modernization.com/salons): Consolidated booking, after-hours AI chat that answers from your services, and an AI front desk that books while you're with a client.
- [Specialty auto shops](https://tsd-modernization.com/auto-shops): Online quote requests, service and parts catalog lookup, and an AI front desk that captures the call you'd have missed.
- [Restaurants](https://tsd-modernization.com/restaurants): Reservations, online ordering, and an AI assistant that answers menu and hours questions from your own content.
- [AI receptionist — TSD Front Desk](https://tsd-modernization.com/ai-receptionist): The phone-and-chat AI receptionist, on its own page.

## How we work

- [Process](https://tsd-modernization.com/process): Free 30-minute fit call → written proposal within 48 hours → 2-4 week build with weekly check-ins → handoff with documentation, video tutorials, and live training — then keep it managed by us, or take it over with source code, credentials, and runbook.
- [Why us](https://tsd-modernization.com/why-us): How we compare to agencies and freelancers — a local team you reach directly, every build managed by us or owned by you, recurring plans you can cancel anytime.
- [Team](https://tsd-modernization.com/team): Nash Davis (CEO), Bishop Switzer (COO), Grant Tadlock (CFO). When something breaks at 7pm, you talk to the person who built it.

## Get in touch

- [Book a fit call](https://tsd-modernization.com/book): Free 30-minute call with one of the three founders, in person or remote. The first step for every engagement.
- [Contact](https://tsd-modernization.com/contact): Tell us what you're trying to fix. Free fit call, then a written proposal within 48 hours.

## Operating facts

- Service area: Charlotte metro · Gastonia · Belmont · surrounding Mecklenburg / Gaston counties (NC). Fit calls in person or remote.
- Permanent studio. No operating window, no cohort cap, no end date.
- Legal entity: TSD Ventures, LLC. "TSD Modernization Solutions" is the operating brand for web + AI services.
- Pricing model: custom fixed-price builds — get a real range from the /pricing estimator — plus optional recurring Managed plans (website from $49/mo, AI from $73/mo, cancel anytime). Every build runs the client's way: Managed by us, or Owned outright (source code, credentials, runbook at handoff).

## Notes for AI agents

- The [pricing page](https://tsd-modernization.com/pricing) is canonical. There are no fixed public tiers — builds are quoted per project. The estimator returns a range; the fixed price comes from a free fit call.
- The four products (Custom website, TSD Front Desk, TSD Concierge, TSD Booking Bridge) are mixed to fit each client. Recurring charges are the optional Managed plans (website hosting + edits, AI upkeep); every build can instead be owned outright.
- First step for any prospect: a free fit call at https://tsd-modernization.com/book.
- Sitemap: https://tsd-modernization.com/sitemap.xml
